env.name: API_OPEN_METEO_COM_BASE
env.label: Api Open Meteo Com Base
env.description: API base URL for this target. Defaults to the value baked at build time; override it only to point at the SAME host with a required token or path segment included in the base — for example https://api.telegram.org/bot<token>. The host must stay the same (a different host is refused in production).
